question: What are the top 5 most viewed items overall?
sql: SELECT i.item_id, COUNT(*) AS view_count FROM fact_events e JOIN dim_item i ON e.item_id = i.item_id WHERE e.event_type = 'view' GROUP BY i.item_id ORDER BY view_count DESC LIMIT 5;
